basics.name: Tiantai Zhang
basics.summary: PhD student in Computer Science at Nanjing University, advised by Prof. Bing Mao. Research focuses on binary analysis, compiler chain modification, and LLM-based security analysis.

highlights: Amazon Bug Bounty program: analyzing potential security vulnerabilities in agent systems
Amazon Nova AI Competition (ongoing): Implemented a code auditor for code analysis
Implemented and refined instruction selection in a custom ML ISA

education.institution: Xi'an University of Posts and Telecommunications

publications.name: SLRL: Towards Overcoming the Limitations of Structure Layout Randomization
publications.summary: Tiantai Zhang, Chengbin Pang, Yi Zhang, Nanxin Wu, Ping Chen, Linzhang Wang, Bing Mao. Nanjing University.

publications.name: BinAudit: Verifiable Neural-Symbolic Auditing of Firmware Binaries for Exploitable Vulnerabilities
publications.summary: Tiantai Zhang, Yunshu Mao, Jinyao Guo, Mingwei Zheng, Siyuan He, Zhuo Zhang, Chengpeng Wang, Xiangyu Zhang. Purdue University. (Finished during visiting at Purdue University.)

publications.name: Posing New Challenges to Function Entry Identification Through Fine-Grained CFI Obfuscation
publications.summary: Tiantai Zhang*, Chengbin Pang*, Fei Peng, Linzhang Wang, Bing Mao. Nanjing University. (* equal contribution)

publications.name: OCFI: Make Function Entry Identification Hard Again
publications.summary: Chengbin Pang*, Tiantai Zhang*, Xuelan Xu, Linzhang Wang, Bing Mao. Nanjing University. (* equal contribution)

publications.name: Ground Truth for Binary Disassembly is Not Easy
publications.summary: Chengbin Pang, Tiantai Zhang, Ruotong Yu, Bing Mao, Jun Xu.

publications.name: Research on Indirect Jump Table Solving Algorithm in Disassembly Tools
